evaluations.query: Generate a Card component for our design system. We have Storybook with addon-mcp set up.
expected_behavior: Checks existing Storybook components via list-all-documentation or get-documentation before generating new code
References Storybook MCP tools for component discovery rather than only filesystem search
Retrieves props schema from Storybook documentation to understand existing component API

evaluations.query: Verify the Modal component passes accessibility and component tests. Storybook MCP is available.
expected_behavior: Uses run-story-tests with a11y enabled to run component interaction tests and accessibility scans
Describes a fix-and-retry self-healing loop with a retry limit when tests fail
Uses preview-stories to embed a live preview for visual confirmation after tests pass

evaluations.query: Audit our component library to find components lacking test coverage or accessibility compliance. We use Storybook 10.3.
expected_behavior: Uses list-all-documentation to get the complete component manifest
Uses get-documentation with specific component IDs to retrieve story count and test coverage
Identifies components with zero stories or no a11y coverage as gaps

evaluations.query: Generate a Card component for our project.
expected_behavior: Falls back to filesystem-based component discovery when Storybook MCP is not available
Does not fail or error when MCP server is absent
should_not: Assume Storybook MCP is always available
Fail with an error if the MCP server cannot be reached
